message:
fix(tmux): require explicit opt-in for cleanup session tests

TestCleanupOrphanedSessions and TestCleanupOrphanedSessions_NoSessions
call CleanupOrphanedSessions() which kills ALL gt-*/hq-* sessions that
appear orphaned. The previous safety check (skip if production sessions
exist) was insufficient - it failed to protect 8 beads crew sessions
that were killed when gastown/refinery ran `go test ./...` as part of
a patrol formula.

Now these tests require GT_TEST_ALLOW_CLEANUP_TEST=1 to run at all,
making them skip by default in any environment. The secondary check
for existing sessions remains as defense in depth.

Fixes: gt-hkpv

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
